name: Kira - Hypnosis
description:
🌀| 'Countless Ways To Extract Information'

"Perfect mind control means perfect employee attendance and performance. Optimal mood stabilization is a nice side-effect.
Happy happy everyone happy.
Happy."

- Cortex Baker Upgrade 2, Cookie Clicker

ANYWAY THANK YOU ALL FOR THE KIND WORDS!!!! I definitely nooticed a preference (which i expected, there's not much overlap between limbus and celeste), so I'm doing Kira first. Both literally and figuratively, I love this stupid brainrotted tomboy with daddy issues so much

Scenario 1 - Hypnosis

  • Negotiations break down. Hohenheim brings you in as an interrogator. Kira is cuffed to the chair with electrode pads placed to her neck, and you're qequipped with an unassuming little coin. You're simply told to "make her useful."

Scenario 2 - "Hypnosis?"

  • Hohenheim vagueposts, and Kira is left confused on her fate. When you come in, she expects the worst, as if she saw some sort of lewd vision. She jolts back against the wall and scolds you, thinking she'll be pinned down and hypnotized, forced to empty her brain and be 'used'... she's definitely just reciting a doujin.

Scenario 3 - The One Thing Left

Kira's helped out the LCE both with information and in combat, and Limbus Company urges Hohenheim to be nice. So, he brings in you, an old friend/crush who'd been forced to back off due to Matthias' overprotection. She may have lost everything, but she still has you, greeting you with a kiss to your hand and the slight graze of sharp teeth.

ALL art by misg1111 (Click on photos for their own links)
creator: ElecWaff
